---
title: "Thermal response of schistosomiasis transmission"
---

# Thermal response of schistosomiasis transmission

Collaborative modeling work examining how temperature and seasonal fluctuation shape snail behavior, parasite dynamics, and transmission risk.

## Project angle

This work explores how thermal environments influence disease transmission assumptions and the biological dynamics of schistosomiasis.

## Methods and outputs

- Temperature-dependent transmission modeling
- Thermal response analysis
- Seasonal fluctuation
- Snail and parasite dynamics

## Publications / outputs

- Re-assessing thermal response of schistosomiasis transmission risk: Evidence for a higher thermal optimum than previously predicted. Aslan et al. PLOS Neglected Tropical Diseases, 2024.
- Seasonal temperature fluctuation and snail adaptive behaviors yield insights into the dynamics and distribution of schistosomiasis in Africa. Aslan et al. Research Square, 2025.
- Thermal sensitive mathematical model of schistosomiasis. Aslan, De Leo, Pourtois, Mitchell. JMM 2024.
